module_design.design_summary: Remove dead code from main.py and ui/app.py: main.py: remove write_date assignment + logger.info referencing it; remove get_next_business_day import. ui/app.py: remove write_date assignment + logger.info; remove get_next_business_day import; remove inline import re as _re; add import re at file top; change _re.sub to re.sub.
module_design.interface_contract: No interface changes — dead code removal only. write_date was computed but never used downstream (not passed to any function). re is used only for _re.sub call; top-level import is equivalent.
module_design.implementation_plan: 1. main.py: Remove write_date = get_next_business_day(today) and logger.info with write_date 2. main.py: Remove get_next_business_day from business_day import 3. ui/app.py: Remove write_date line and logger.info referencing it 4. ui/app.py: Remove get_next_business_day from business_day import 5. ui/app.py: Add import re at file top (with other stdlib imports) 6. ui/app.py: Remove inline import re as _re; change _re.sub to re.sub
module_design.verification_plan: T6: "write_date = get_next_business_day" NOT in main.py source T7: "import re as _re" NOT in ui/app.py source
